task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 06-6-001 Troubleshoot the chiller [Special Tests] (V2)

section.title: Function
section.p: Check the performance of the chiller.
Use 'Continue' to set a new set-point.

note.p: The set-point can only be changed once the current set-point is reached.

section.p: The test shows the two temperature sensors of the chiller, the PWM output of the heater or cooler and the level of the coolant reservoir.
There is always some deviation between the measured temperature values (temp sensor, safety sensor).
Chiller related errors will not be reported, but may cause this test to fail silently.

note.p: Check function of the chiller: 1 minute per 1°C heating is the maximum. This means heating from 22 to 28 °C should not last longer than 6 minutes.
